---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: jtalk22
---

## Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## Problem It Solves
Describe the problem or limitation this feature would address.

## Proposed Solution
How do you think this should work?

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case
Describe your specific use case for this feature.

## Rollout Context
- Deployment mode target: [stdio / web / http / worker-smithery]
- Team size: [1 / 2-5 / 6-20 / 20+]
- Urgency: [low / medium / high]
- Is this for a production team workflow? [yes/no]

## Support Envelope
- Desired support level: [docs only / occasional guidance / active rollout support]
- Time sensitivity: [this month / this quarter / exploratory]

## Additional Context
Add any other context, mockups, or examples here.
